intentSynonyms: show me my monitors in sentry
see all my monitors in sentry
list cron monitors in the organization in sentry
description: List cron monitors for the current Sentry organization. Monitors track scheduled jobs (crons) and alert when check-ins are missed or fail.

limit.description: Maximum number of monitors to return (default 25, max 100)

cursor.description: Pagination cursor from a previous response
